intro: Loeseneriella serrata, also known as Chinese angelica or Loesener's angelica, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
